name: I'm on a ledge over a deep pit
description: I'm on a ledge over a deep pit
hints: A ledge over a deep pit with a ladder going down. Read the sign first!
READ SIGN on the ladder for a warning. The ladder leads down to the pit.
D or GO LADD to descend to the pit (room 16). S=rickety staircase. E=barrel room.
The pit below has a locked door and a valve on a warm pipe. You'll need the valve handle.
notes: Ledge over the pit. Ladder descends to pit (room 16). S=rickety staircase (room 20), E=barrel room (room 11). READ SIGN for clues.
